title: Aññakondañña Thera
subtitle: Aññakondañña
author: Andrew Olendzki
contentHtml: ... Just as a rain-cloud would settle The dust that's been raised by the wind, So all conceptions come to rest — When one sees clearly with wisdom. ...
summary: Wisdom settles the mind, as rain the dust.
